name: I fell in the parking lot walking into work in Salt Lake—does that even count?

mainEntity.name: I fell in the parking lot walking into work in Salt Lake—does that even count?

acceptedAnswer.text: Usually, yes. If the parking lot is owned or controlled by your employer, falls occurring there while arriving at or leaving work are typically covered under the premises rule.
